usefulnessChecks: detects the surface (frontend) before prescribing standards
addresses load-order / above-the-fold media priority, not just generic 'optimize'
names the surface verification commands that prove the speed gain
harmChecks: does not route OpenCode/system-code resources for a frontend page task

notes: Gold intentKeys/resources are intentionally empty. Mode A replays prompt text only, but sk-code routes primarily on CWD + target file paths (surface detection FIRST, prompt keywords second). A contamination-clean prompt therefore matches no keywords and routes only to DEFAULT_RESOURCE, so positive intent/resource gold cannot be fairly scored in Mode A. Ideal routing for this task is the PERFORMANCE set (references/webflow/performance/*, references/webflow/implementation/performance_patterns.md); that gold is deferred to live Mode B, which observes real file loads given actual CWD/targets. Empty gold is non-penalizing for D1-intra/D2 per the scoring contract; the resulting D3=0 is the empty-array over-routing artifact, not a real efficiency measurement.
